# Diff files to instead write to submoduleTriaged as "triaged" changes.

# Each group should include a link to the tracking issue.

# JSX runtime module resolution change
## https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3480
## TS2875 error requiring `react/jsx-runtime` or `react/jsx-dev-runtime` module is no longer emitted for non-module (script) files
compiler/commentsOnJSXExpressionsArePreserved(jsx=react-jsx,module=commonjs,moduledetection=legacy).errors.txt.diff
compiler/commentsOnJSXExpressionsArePreserved(jsx=react-jsxdev,module=commonjs,moduledetection=legacy).errors.txt.diff

# Static property conflicts with built-in Function properties (TS2699) no longer reported when useDefineForClassFields was false
## https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3484

# Corsa no longer emits the TS-1 internal diagnostic about pre-emit/post-emit diagnostic count mismatches
## https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3508

# TS2690 (with "Did you mean 'P in K'?" mapped type suggestion) changed to TS2693 (generic "refers to a type, but is being used as a value") — mapped type suggestion lost
## https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3509
compiler/typeUsedAsTypeLiteralIndex.errors.txt.diff

# Unicode escapes in identifier names now displayed as literal characters
## https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3511
